title: Oil exceeds $90 after Iranian attack on tankers and Houthi threat in the Red Sea
summary: The conflict in the Middle East increases geopolitical tension, raises prices of crude oil, gold, and silver, and creates caution in European stock markets.

title: Global stock markets bounce back driven by the rebound in semiconductors and artificial intelligence
summary: Expectations of favorable results and the recovery of chip manufacturers lead the gains on Wall Street, Europe, and Asia, despite geopolitical tensions.

title: London Stock Exchange announces plans to operate 24 hours a day by 2027
summary: The initiative aims to adapt to global demand and compete with other financial markets in continuous trading.

title: Judge temporarily suspends the $110 billion merger between Warner Bros. Discovery and Paramount
summary: The judicial pause halts the biggest deal of the year while antitrust authorities examine the operation.

title: ASML and TSMC lead declines in the semiconductor sector after their quarterly results
summary: Weak forecasts from the European and Taiwanese chipmakers drag down the sector and raise doubts about demand.
